purpose: Certify an autonomous MaskFactory runtime and its ComfyUI bridge for an exact, versioned, evidence-bound operating scope.

allowed_claims: The exact bound artifacts passed the declared deterministic, critic, ownership, transform, recovery, and integration gates.
The pinned producer release and adopted consumer contract completed the certified end-to-end operating slice.
forbidden_claims: General population accuracy beyond the exact evidence-bound scope.
Unbounded quality guarantees for unseen distributions.
Authority for artifacts, labels, contexts, providers, or versions absent from the certificate.
Treating operationally certified artifacts as training gold, accuracy truth, or contributions to independent-real-accuracy and corpus-volume gates without a separate signed promotion transaction.

required_gates.acceptance: Every producer and consumer bridge document validates against its pinned schema and portable canonicalization vectors; authenticated envelopes bind nonce, role, trust set, and exact payload; every negative invariant fixture fails closed.

The consumer pins and adopts one immutable producer snapshot with out-of-band trusted role keys, verified signatures and raw-byte hashes, a complete signed journal genesis-to-head checkpoint, fresh revocation state, compatibility, and contract-test evidence.

Access mode never determines authority; Mode A and Mode B are noncertified unless wrapped by an active, unrevoked, exact-route/output operational certificate with scope, QA, roundtrip, lineage, and at-use revocation gates passing; the operational tier cannot count as training or accuracy gold and the controller cannot self-escalate authority.

All blocking gates bind encoded and canonical decoded pixels, exact mask identity, canonical subject/provider assignment, explicit target/protected owner roster, executable typed transform steps and roundtrip, and video temporal consistency where supported; otherwise the runtime abstains and quarantines the affected artifact.

Retries are bounded and materially changed, transport replay is idempotent, submitted-but-unknown work is reconciled without duplicate or unreconciled resubmission, exactly one new submission is permitted only after a signed verified remote not-found result, the receipt is the last atomic commit, signed invalidations tombstone eligibility and cache state, and failures block only dependent passes.

The pinned controller completes single- and multi-instance still-image flows and, for every advertised video-capable route, exact frame and frame-span flows with source video hash, decoded frame hash, frame index, PTS/timebase, neighbor/span manifest, lineage, ownership, coordinate, authority, and promotion behavior preserved end to end.
